description_long: This is a single-story residential house with a light tan brick exterior and a prominent front porch accessed by a set of white steps. The house features a spacious wooden deck on one side, furnished with outdoor seating and a grill, and a small covered patio area beneath. The roof is a simple gable style, and the windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern, with a large arched window on one side and rectangular windows throughout. The property includes a long driveway leading up to the front steps, flanked by green lawns and landscaping, and a blossoming tree is visible near the house. The overall design is reminiscent of a suburban ranch-style home, with practical outdoor spaces and a welcoming entryway.
description: A tan brick, single-story suburban house with a gable roof, front porch, wooden deck, and symmetrical windows, set on a landscaped lot with a long driveway and a blossoming tree.
description_view_0: Side view showing the wooden deck with outdoor furniture, covered patio below, and the blossoming tree in the foreground.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main entry steps, porch, symmetrical windows, and the long driveway leading up to the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back steps, arched window, and the expanse of the backyard lawn.
description_view_3: Side view with the tan brick wall, arched window, and a clear look at the deck and tree to the right.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with one large arched window
attribute_entryway_design: Central front steps leading to a covered porch with white railings and columns, flanked by landscaping.
